translations.2024-09-14-深夜读书.md:body:万籁俱寂的深夜，台灯下翻开一本心:
In the late night when everything was silent, I opened a book I had long wanted under the desk lamp. The moonlight outside the window quietly penetrated and coated the pages with a layer of silver. This was the most beautiful time when you were alone.
